Banking L&D Leaders Meet 2026

A gathering of Banking Learning & Development leaders, industry experts, and IIBF leadership at the Banking L&D Leaders' Meet 2026, united by a shared vision of strengthening capabilities and shaping the future-ready banker.

Webinar on “Digital Lending: Convenience, Compliance, Inclusion and Customer Protection”

IIBF organized a webinar on “Digital Lending: Convenience, Compliance, Inclusion and Customer Protection” as part of its Member Education Series on June 5, 2026. Prof. Ram Kumar Kakani, Vice Chancellor, RV University, has delivered the Keynote session on ‘Digital Lending: Convenience, Compliance, Inclusion and Customer Protection’ .

Basic Sign Language Communication for Inclusive Banking Services From 18th May to 20th May 2026

The programme aims to sensitize banking professionals by equipping them with basic sign language communication skills to assist PWD (HH) customers.

AMP Immersion (Batch XIV) First batch at IIBF FY 25-26 at Leadership Centre from 4th-8th May 2026.

The first batch of AMP Immersion (Batch XIV) for FY 2025–26 was successfully conducted at the IIBF Leadership Centre from 4th to 8th May 2026. The programme brought together participants for an engaging learning experience focused on leadership, professional development, and knowledge sharing.

Reimagining impact: AI – Driven Skilling, Financial Inclusion and Social Enterprise for Viksit Bharat

At the 5th Samarth Bharat Conclave 2026 by AISECT India, Mr. Deepak Kumar Lalla, CEO, Indian Institute of Banking & Finance, delivered a special address, sharing key perspectives on building an inclusive and future-ready financial ecosystem.

CEO, IIBF Delivers Keynote at JAGSoM’s International Conference on Sustainable India

Mr. Deepak Kumar Lalla, Chief Executive Officer - IIBF, delivered a keynote address at Jagdish Sheth School of Management (JAGSoM), Bengaluru during the International Conference on “Sustainable India: Bridging ESG Principles with Indian Knowledge Systems.”

MoU Exchange with International School of Informatics & Management, Jaipur

The MoU exchange took place on 17th March 2026 and marks another step towards fostering industry-aligned education and skill development.

Renewal with Jagdish Sheth School of Management (JAGSoM), Bengaluru

Reaffirming our continued commitment to fostering industry-ready management professionals.

MoU Exchange with Presidency University, Bengaluru and IIBF

MoU Exchange with Presidency University, Bengaluru - Advancing academic excellence through structured collaboration in banking and financial services.

MoU Exchange with Kristu Jayanti (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru and IIBF

MoU Exchange with Kristu Jayanti (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru - Partnering to enhance industry-aligned learning and professional certification opportunities.

MoU Exchange with Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science College, Coimbatore and IIBF

MoU Exchange with Dr. N.G.P. Arts and Science College, Coimbatore - Formalizing a strategic academic collaboration to strengthen banking and finance education.

Banking Chanakya -2025 Inter-Bank Quiz Contest

The fifth season of the Inter-Bank Quiz Contest Banking Chanakya has been successfully conducted by the Institute and RBI has emerged the Champions winning a cash prize of ₹1,00,000/-

15th R K Talwar Memorial Lecture

Shri B V R Subrahmanyam, CEO, NITI Aayog is welcomed by Shri C S Setty, Chairman SBI & President IIBF, in presence of Shri Biswa Ketan Das, CEO, IIBF

Notice

Schedule of Certificate Examinations under Remote Proctored mode – May 2026

Given below is the proposed schedule for May 2026:

Sr. No Exam date Day Registration
Start date End date
1. 09th May 2026 2nd Saturday 29th April 2026 03rd May 2026

Sr No. Examinations

Date: 23-04-2026                                                                                         Joint Director-Examinations

Notice

Prebid clarifications and Corrigendum to the RFP (Ref No. RFP/ITHW/25-26/03 Dated 30/03/2026 “TO SUPPLY, INSTALL AND MAINTAIN THE PCs AND LAPTOPS OF THE INSTITUTE”) based on the pre-bid queries received during the pre-bid meeting held on 10th April 2026 at IIBF CO Mumbai

Notice

Flipbooks Now Available for JAIIB & CAIIB Study Books.

Notice

The Institute has introduced a Certificate Course on Operational Risk Management. Registration will begin on 01 April 2026, and the examination will be conducted from July 2026 in center-based mode.

The Institute has also introduced the Diploma in Treasury, Investment and Risk Management under the revised syllabus from the July 2026 examination. Candidates with remaining valid attempts will be eligible to continue under the old syllabus.

Registration for this course will also begin on 01 April 2026.

The revised syllabus for the Diploma in International Banking and Finance will be implemented from the January 2027 examination.Please refer to the rules and syllabus for further details.

Notice

The registration for certificate courses scheduled to be conducted on 11th April 2026 under the remote proctored mode will commence today i.e 02nd April 2026 at 06:30 PM.

Candidates are advised to take note of the same.
